name: Cucumber-Radish Salsa
recipeIngredient: 1 cup radishes, washed and thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the diced cucumbers, sliced radishes, minced garlic, chopped jalapeño chile, and salt in a large bowl.
2. Mix well until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
3. Cover the mixture with plastic wrap and refrigerate for 2 to 96 hours, allowing flavors to meld.
4. Serve slightly chilled or at room temperature.
